description: Minimal triadic substrate using TFT framework plus triad-aligned field structures. Identical in form and function to RTT substrate, but with softened terminology for accessibility.

T1.notes: Base temporal layer; stable and intuitive.

T2.notes: Supports dimensional blending and local coherence.

T3.notes: Governs global stability and cross-layer alignment.

continuity_field.invariant: No abrupt transitions across nested dimensions
continuity_field.notes: Soft equivalent of RTT continuity substrate.

drift_field.invariant: Local variations remain bounded by triadic envelope
drift_field.notes: Soft equivalent of RTT drift envelope.

integration_field.notes: Soft equivalent of RTT integration field.

envelope_sync.invariant: Harmonic coherence maintained across triadic envelope

triadic_alignment_tensor.notes: Ensures all substrate fields remain aligned with T1/T2/T3 layers.

example_usage.scenario: Triadic field blending for stable region modeling
steps: Begin in T1 local time band.
Apply layer_shift to enter T2 harmonic uplift.
Use envelope_sync to align with T3 triadic envelope.
Blend continuity_field and drift_field using field_blend.
Resulting integration_field provides stable triadic region behavior.
example_usage.expected_outcome: A stable, triad-aligned region model without exposing RTT terminology.
